title: Decision Provenance Standard Decision Interface Charter
description: Charter object schema per Standard §3 and §3.2. Required fields are conditional on charter_state per the state machine.

charter_id.description: Stable identifier; survives ownership and rename changes.

accountable_owner.description: Single named human. One and only one.

mode_declaration.description: Required at any state past `open`. Enum is exhaustive — no fourth mode. Drift caught at state transition.

record_location.description: URL or path. Hygiene rule: 'findable in 30 seconds by someone not in the room.'

re_decision_triggers.description: Minimum: 1 outcome-evidence + 1 market-evidence trigger per the Standard's re-decision-trigger requirement.

escalation_rule.description: Pointer to the Charter's escalation rule (handled by /escalation-rule skill).

schedule_of_records.description: Committed enumerated set of decision records this Charter will produce.

disclosure_metadata_pointer.description: Required when mode_declaration is mode-2 or mode-1-with-embedded-mode-2-summary. Points to the Article 50 disclosure metadata block.

peer_reviewer_pool.description: Minimum 3 named individuals per Layer 3 designation rule (eligibility: substantive expertise + author exclusion + Charter-owner exclusion when author + recusal carve-out).

affirmer_consent.description: Conditional sub-field required when scope is individual-development-coaching.

use_case_scope_limit_declaration.description: Standard §3.1 (rev6 Wave 0d). Required at fields-completed where any record describes a natural person below executive altitude. Enumerated default-permitted scopes; individual-development-coaching carries conditional consent sub-fields. Load-bearing for §6.2.3.1 access-policy binding.

works_council_consultation_record.description: Standard §3.1 (rev6 Wave 0d). Required at fields-completed in EU/UK works-council jurisdictions where altitude is function-leader or below. Conditional, not top-level required.
